=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 2/9/97, Tokyo, Japan "Hall "A", Tokyo International Forum, 2CDR

Holy grail; Audience recording (Lego parapets) > Unknown transfer > CDR(x) > EAC (Secure) > FLAC > Data DVD Trade, Described as Holy Grail.;; not much above 16k except lego parapets; diferent recording than bach LB-4411 based on different clapping at end of d1t7; in comparison this is harsher and not as full of sound; (did not listen to all of this)

CD1

55:33, 1. Down In The Flood (Crash On The Levee), 2. I Want You, 3. All Along the Watchtower, 4. Just Like A Woman, 5. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 6. Silvio, 7. Oh Babe It Ain't No Lie, 8. Masters of War, 9. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right,

CD2

45:45, 1. Seeing the Real You At Last, 2. Simple Twist of Fate, 3. Highway 61 Revisited, encore, 4. Like A Rolling Stone, 5. It Ain't Me, Babe, 6. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
